name: Cory Booker
subject: We need 538 donors from Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, I know I'm an underdog in this race. I don't have a built-in network of online donors, and I can't self-fund this campaign. Our team is being built by people like you, chipping in what they can when they can -- that's how I believe this system should work. Not with wealthy corporations or special interests funding candidates. That means these internal budget deadlines matter even more to us. Right now, we're closing in on our goal of raising $250,000 by tonight. [**My team did the math, and in order to hit that goal, we need 538 donors from Pennsylvania to chip in before our campaign budget deadline at midnight. Can you be one of them?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190915_CB_20190915-fr-CB-microgoals4-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") After the debate on Thursday, I've never been more excited to take on Donald Trump on the national stage. But let's be clear, this election is not a referendum on Donald Trump. It's a referendum on who we are and who we're going to be as a people. We need to use this moment to unite in common cause and common purpose so we can solve some of the biggest issues facing our country. [**If that 's a message you can get behind, then please, step up before tonight is over and be one of the 538 donors from Pennsylvania to reach our fundraising goal.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190915_CB_20190915-fr-CB-microgoals4-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks so much,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190915_CB_20190915-fr-CB-microgoals4-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0be3/5fca0d19/74fa4ba8/291e60ca/987410363/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0be3/5fca0d19/74fa4ba8/291e60c9/987410363/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0be3/5fca0d19/74fa4ba8/291e60c8/987410363/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0be3/5fca0d19/74fa4ba8/291e60d7/987410363/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0be3/5fca0d19/74fa4ba8/291e60d6/987410363/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0be3/5fca0d19/74fa4ba8/291e60ca/987410363/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9984438/99692367/979390018?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTI1NTc1OS04NGQ4LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6QUIMTp6V1uMj__rDg4SxVchkbXipgGiIK2cqwPsWO0=&emci=9d255759-84d8-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=9e255759-84d8-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)
Peter,
We are excited to announce another campaign endorsement, from Congresswoman Veronica Escobar in TX-16!
Our campaign recently took a trip to the US-Mexico border and met with Congresswoman Escobar in El Paso following the tragic shooting earlier this summer. She is courageously leading the charge on the national gun violence epidemic. I am so grateful for her support and hope to serve alongside her.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9984439/99692368/-1594214468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTI1NTc1OS04NGQ4LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6QUIMTp6V1uMj__rDg4SxVchkbXipgGiIK2cqwPsWO0=&refcode=ve16)**
_**“As a veteran, mom, and teacher, Elisa knows that weapons of war don’t belong on our streets or in our classrooms. Elisa will be an ally for common sense gun legislation and I’m proud to endorse her campaign for TX-02.” - Rep. Escobar**_
Right now the momentum is with us as we quickly approach our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. [**Chip in today to give us a strong foundation to flip TX-02 next fall.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9984440/99692369/-1594214468?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTI1NTc1OS04NGQ4LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6QUIMTp6V1uMj__rDg4SxVchkbXipgGiIK2cqwPsWO0=&refcode=ve16)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Your name on the Donor Wall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I want to see YOUR name on the Donor Wall. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8e01026d3fd01a79477df4840be17210519b7e1249b189023468e4a53d3ee235a618d5c8baeb7f6615432322443c494d5d75b5618b1a8a03)
---
_" January 20th, 2017 will be remembered as the day the people became the rulers of this nation again. The forgotten men and women of our country will be forgotten no longer."_
(U.S. Capitol Steps, 01/20/2017)
---
|
On Inauguration Day, when I was sworn into office, hand over Bible, I promised that you would never be forgotten again, Friend.

For too long, a small group in our nation's capital reaped the rewards of government while the people suffered. Washington flourished, but YOU did not share in its wealth.

**Since then we 've been WINNING for YOU at an unprecedented rate:**
* Unemployment rates are the lowest they've been in decades
* We've created MILLIONS of new jobs
* The Beautiful WALL is being built
* We appointed two fantastic conservative Supreme Court Justices
* America is respected on the world stage again

**America is GREAT again. Now it 's up to YOU to Keep America Great!**

Since you've been such a great supporter, I want to offer you something very exclusive. _(Don 't share this offer!)_

**I am dedicating a wall for a select group of donors who choose to step up at this critical time. Space is limited on the Official 2019 Trump Donor Wall, so be sure to act fast!**

This is the best time for you to make your VERY FIRST contribution to my campaign, and cement your name in political history.

**[Please make your best contribution before 11:59 PM TONIGHT to be one of the FIRST donors to have their name permanently engraved on the Official 2019 Trump Donor Wall.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=97057b8d4e272e4ca7e35aae60285963c031831443cfa2827eac4b090fe9f46e6b999718f9fda3fac00fb43e568aa3aa0a317243bedb4537)**

subject: Military families deserve better [Action Needed]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/CHN_0CQS7Rs0rGge9b980pR-XniZtxv9Yyvov1AswzE=/qSvQqPJCgLYR9d-PHsl1i1MbH-qS3eC2nQgAVYh5jVo=?refcode=20190916militaryjaemail)
---

_**[SIGN ON NOW: Protect Citizenship for US Military Kids!](https://act.myngp.com/el/CHN_0CQS7Rs0rGge9b980pR-XniZtxv9Yyvov1AswzE=/RR2bZi1rq5zMTrF3rgkqs_UL7Z534cbWBhw9sxiggzg=)**_
Team,

With the constant barrage of scandals from the Trump Administration it can be easy to miss something (sometimes I wonder if that's the point!), but I wanted to make sure you heard about this:

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/CHN_0CQS7Rs0rGge9b980pR-XniZtxv9Yyvov1AswzE=/7vB-ltLUMZAReQ95Xy-YGAkodWUCqwTU10dlZYWapBM=) [**This is unacceptable. Join me, and leaders from across the nation, in demanding the Trump Administration immediately restore the right of automatic citizenship to children of U.S military members living abroad.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CHN_0CQS7Rs0rGge9b980pR-XniZtxv9Yyvov1AswzE=/7vB-ltLUMZAReQ95Xy-YGAkodWUCqwTU10dlZYWapBM=)
| ****[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/CHN_0CQS7Rs0rGge9b980pR-XniZtxv9Yyvov1AswzE=/RR2bZi1rq5zMTrF3rgkqs_UL7Z534cbWBhw9sxiggzg=)****
---

As a former Foreign Service Officer, I served our nation abroad for over 14 years fighting to protect national security and reduce conflict around the world. I know how grueling it can be to serve our nation abroad, both for our military members and their families.

These patriots deserve honor and respect while they risk their lives abroad to protect our freedoms. Instead, this administration is making them jump through unnecessary hoops.

[**Will you help me send a message to the White House? Let Trump know that treating our military families this way is unacceptable!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CHN_0CQS7Rs0rGge9b980pR-XniZtxv9Yyvov1AswzE=/7vB-ltLUMZAReQ95Xy-YGAkodWUCqwTU10dlZYWapBM=)

******[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/CHN_0CQS7Rs0rGge9b980pR-XniZtxv9Yyvov1AswzE=/RR2bZi1rq5zMTrF3rgkqs_UL7Z534cbWBhw9sxiggzg=)******
---

Thank you for taking action,
Sri Preston Kulkarni

******[DONATE NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/CHN_0CQS7Rs0rGge9b980pR-XniZtxv9Yyvov1AswzE=/qSvQqPJCgLYR9d-PHsl1i1MbH-qS3eC2nQgAVYh5jVo=?refcode=20190916militaryjaemail)******

clean_body: Peter, With this FEC quarter wrapping up, local media is really starting the cover this race. Just last week The Austin Chronicle reported on how our campaign had the most powerful message and could bring this district into Democratic hands. The FEC fundraising deadline is only two weeks away, and every contribution gets us a little closer to our goal of representation for the people, not for profit. We've witnessed over and over again the incredible dedication and resourcefulness of the people who make up the Texas 10th. It’s thanks to every one of you who contributed your time, donations, skills, and passion to our campaign that we have such a strong campaign. name: Cory Booker
subject: We cannot miss this goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| After last week's debate, my team set a goal to raise $250,000 by midnight on September 15th. **Team, I'm writing to let you know that we 're extending our deadline to midnight tonight.** **[Will you chip in right now to make sure we hit our $250,000 goal?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190916_CB_20190916-fr-CB-postdebate-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I know this is no easy task -- but the FEC filing deadline is two weeks away, and we can't fall behind. Our campaign has seen real momentum these last few weeks, and we need to show the people that this underdog campaign can keep it up. **[So please, team, help us reach our $250,000 goal by 11:59 p.m. tonight.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190916_CB_20190916-fr-CB-postdebate-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks for helping us reach this critical goal,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190916_CB_20190916-fr-CB-postdebate-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Pam Tucker's iPhone
subject: New Hampshire Democrats continue the gun-grab
body:
Derek, Democrats are continuing their out-of-touch gun grab, with Democrat gubernatorial candidate Dan Feltes calling for gun licensing this past weekend. [](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjQ2MzYwODE2MTk4ODgyMzU1JmM9ZTZvMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzc0Nzg0MjImZD1hMmg5cDd4.g2YMWcMXHhGjS2qw90i4ybdBHGbWA4tVUKc3IUk6Kdk) Feltes is following in the footsteps of Beto O'Rourke, and let's be clear - all Democrats want to take away your right to defend yourself. The New Hampshire Constitution is clear - **Granite Staters have the right to own a firearm.** Dan Feltes and Democrats like him want to infringe upon our rights. **[Are you going to let him?](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjQ2MzYwODE2MTk4ODgyMzU1JmM9ZTZvMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzc0Nzg0MjQmZD1hNHU4cDdr.PgRanUEINo12qbk3NwSWS1rB0XlDTjSbKXrvOg0dorA)** [Can you chip in $5, $10, or $25 to reject Dan Feltes' anti-gun agenda?](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjQ2MzYwODE2MTk4ODgyMzU1JmM9ZTZvMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzc0Nzg0MjYmZD1vNnU1ejZ0.SvZo2vmO5zCF7DXePZXH7jtwA_BUix3W9n4adE71cjo) Sincerely, Pam Tucker
NHGOP Vice Chair
* * *
###### ****
###### **New Hampshire Republican State Committee** | 10 Water Street, Concord
This email was sent to [**dpwillis67@gmail.com**](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjQ2MzYwODE2MTk4ODgyMzU1JmM9ZTZvMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzc0NzkxMDQmZD1yMHI2aTZw.WtTSPzbanXFs9P-GJn0iu_JIPcgxcGMXy9SVilQa23w) | [Forward this email to a friend](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMjQ2MzYwODE2MTk4ODgyMzU1JmM9ZTZvMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0yNzc0Nzg0MjgmZD1uMXUybTJr.WrcVnrCnA4pj871ZQ_0Aq1YabNvctc_lqoBDQalLI0c)

name: Campaign Update (via Team Lipinski)
subject: Take a look at what we’ve been up to:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS [Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list
body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9996072/99790056/368741054?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODA0OTYyOS1iMmQ4LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MjUn0FoaWetFSW_p3TUvci-fHGhaoxQo5mv_bVYobZw=&emci=17049629-b2d8-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=18049629-b2d8-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=2478574)

| | | | Hi Peter,

As Congress returns from recess and autumn officially starts, we wanted to catch you up on what Team Lipinski has been up to for the past few weeks. Take a look!

* * *
**_IN THE DISTRICT_**
Dan attended the Davern’s Tavern Fight for the Fallen fundraiser in Justice. This event supports the 100 Club of Chicago, which provides for families of first responders who lost their lives in the line of duty. Dan played Clear Ridge Baseball with tavern owner Joe Davern and had fun seeing Joe’s mom and hearing stories about his parents’ time in the Little League stands.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9996073/99790057/759807594?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODA0OTYyOS1iMmQ4LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MjUn0FoaWetFSW_p3TUvci-fHGhaoxQo5mv_bVYobZw=&refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_190913_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true)
* * *

Dan and his wife Judy had a great time attending LHSEF’s Taste of Lemont. What a fun night supporting Lemont High School!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9996074/99790058/759807594?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODA0OTYyOS1iMmQ4LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MjUn0FoaWetFSW_p3TUvci-fHGhaoxQo5mv_bVYobZw=&refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_190913_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true)
* * *

Dan and Judy also supported St. Cletus School by attending La Grange parish’s Fall Fest last week. Dan even ran into his old St. Ignatius classmate Dan Degnan as well as an alum of St. Syms who was serving up great food at Fat Pepper Catering!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9996075/99790059/759807594?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODA0OTYyOS1iMmQ4LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MjUn0FoaWetFSW_p3TUvci-fHGhaoxQo5mv_bVYobZw=&refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_190913_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true)
* * *

Dan took first in his age group at Sunday’s Midway Fly Away 5K. But far more importantly, the race supports an outstanding cause, Special Olympics Chicago. Dan is proud to help promote the work they do in support of athletes with disabilities.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9996076/99790060/759807594?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODA0OTYyOS1iMmQ4LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MjUn0FoaWetFSW_p3TUvci-fHGhaoxQo5mv_bVYobZw=&refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_190913_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true)
* * *
**_GET INVOLVED_**

clean_body: | | | | | Hi Peter, As Congress returns from recess and autumn officially starts, we wanted to catch you up on what Team Lipinski has been up to for the past few weeks. Take a look! IN THE DISTRICT Dan attended the Davern’s Tavern Fight for the Fallen fundraiser in Justice. This event supports the 100 Club of Chicago, which provides for families of first responders who lost their lives in the line of duty. Dan played Clear Ridge Baseball with tavern owner Joe Davern and had fun seeing Joe’s mom and hearing stories about his parents’ time in the Little League stands. Dan and his wife Judy had a great time attending LHSEF’s Taste of Lemont. What a fun night supporting Lemont High School! Dan and Judy also supported St. Cletus School by attending La Grange parish’s Fall Fest last week. Dan even ran into his old St. Ignatius classmate Dan Degnan as well as an alum of St. Syms who was serving up great food at Fat Pepper Catering! Dan took first in his age group at Sunday’s Midway Fly Away 5K. But far more importantly, the race supports an outstanding cause, Special Olympics Chicago. Dan is proud to help promote the work they do in support of athletes with disabilities. GET INVOLVED If you’d like to help us get the word out about Dan’s work and the fight for IL-03 families, Dan and the team will be attending The Palos Park Autumn in the Park Parade next Saturday (9/21) at 11:00 am. Please contact the office at (773) 284-8566 if you would like to join the congressman and walk the parades! To stay up to date with the campaign in real-time and see a bit more of what Dan and the team are doing, please follow us on and if you haven’t already. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: nervous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi everyone,
Candidly, I'm nervous about the upcoming FEC deadline -- especially with Donald Trump visiting New Hampshire to rally up Republicans.
We have about two weeks to hit our fundraising goal and prove that our movement is stronger than Trump's message of hatred and divisiveness, but our donations have started to slow.
My team says that raising $5,000 today will help make up ground, but I can't do that without your help.[ **I need you to please give $3 or whatever makes sense for you -- right now -- to stop Republicans from flipping this seat, win back the Senate majority, and protect the future of the Supreme Court. Will you please help, everyone?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc385/2a380d31/3db75487/f0dd56/1297906171/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDkxNl9Nb24xXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190916_Mon1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
New Hampshire has always been a battleground state and with action on climate change and protecting abortion access on the line, we can't afford to miss a single goal.
Our campaign has always been powered by people like you giving what you can to emails like this one. I don't rely on corporate special interests. Now, since our donations are lagging, I need your help more than ever:
[**Please give what you can right now so that we can right the ship. I only won in 2016 by 1,017 votes, so this really does matter.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc385/2a380d31/3db75487/f0dd56/1297906171/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDkxNl9Nb24xXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190916_Mon1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thank you for your support -- I appreciate it more than you know.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
> [Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc385/2a380d31/3db75487/f0dd56/1297906171/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDkxNl9Nb24xXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190916_Mon1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

name: Team Beto
subject: Exactly what’s wrong
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Beto shook up the debate by calling for the ban and buyback of assault
weapons. Now the pundits and politicians say it can’t be done. They say we
shouldn’t even try.

This is exactly what’s wrong in our democracy. Some politicians pay
attention to polls instead of people. Candidates make political
calculations based off of fear instead of facts.

Now we face a big test. The refrain we hear from the pundits is that, by
taking a courageous stand, Beto may have shot his own campaign in the
foot. They think that our big ideas will sink us.

We can prove them wrong right now by showing a big surge in our online
fundraising before our official FEC deadline. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/34196?refcode=ema20190916-55529&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=55529%2E444211%2ENz5QMX ]Can you make a
contribution to Beto right now to say you’re proud to support a candidate
who says what he believes and fights for it?

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name if you support our plan to end corruption in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Let's finally end the stranglehold that the wealthy and the well-connected have over our government. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529e72/45c30650/136d205ac/668b1028/1743311317/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
No matter what issue brings you into this fight -- whether it's child care, student loans, health care, immigration, or criminal justice -- one thing is crystal clear: Corruption is making it worse.

Our government works great for the wealthy and well-connected -- just not for everybody else. Giant corporations and billionaires who don't want to pay taxes or follow any rules use their money and influence to stand in the way of the big, structural change we need.

It's corruption, plain and simple. We've got to call it out, and we've got to fight back. So today, **I'm proposing the most sweeping set of anti-corruption reforms since Watergate**.

Our plan includes improving public integrity rules for federal officials in every branch of government, ending lobbying as we know it, fixing the criminal laws to hold corrupt politicians to account, and ensuring our federal agencies and courts are free from corrupting influences. And I'm just getting started.

**[But it's only going to get done if our grassroots movement fights for it, and that comes down to strong supporters like you. Add your name if you're ready to fight to end Washington corruption.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529e72/45c30650/136d205ac/668b102a/1743311317/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUo1MlBfUkxUX0NPUl9FXzIwMTkwOTE2X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-anti-corruption?source=EMJ52P_RLT_COR_E_20190916_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Here are some of the main pieces of our plan:

**1\. Rewrite our ethics laws so that public servants actually serve the public -- not their own financial interests or the financial interests of the rich and powerful.**

Let's face it: Donald Trump is a walking conflict of interest. His refusal to divest from his businesses has opened the door for giant corporations, foreign lobbyists, and our own government officials to curry favor with his administration and pad his own bottom line.

But Washington corruption didn't start with Donald Trump. The problem is much bigger than him, and restoring public confidence isn't just about replacing Trump and his cronies. We need big, structural change, new bright lines, and new clear rules to eliminate the possibility of public officials serving private interests.

One way our plan fights back is by requiring presidents and vice-presidents to put their businesses into a blind trust to be sold off. And we'll **automatically release the tax returns of all federal candidates and officeholders**.

We'll also ban government officials from trading individual stocks, so they can't use their power to increase the value of those stocks and pad their own pockets. And we'll put strict rules on so-called "political intelligence" firms that sell access to insider political information to help Wall Street traders make a quick buck.

Next, it's time to **close and padlock the revolving door between industry and government**. We'll ban "golden parachutes" (pre-bribes that big companies give to executives who are on their way to serving in government), restrict lobbyists from entering government jobs, put a lifetime ban on presidents, vice presidents, members of Congress, and top appointees from becoming lobbyists, and ban companies from immediately hiring former senior government officials from agencies or offices they've been lobbying.

This isn't only a problem for Congress and the White House -- our plan also **holds the federal judiciary to the highest ethical standards**. We'll put tough new rules in place to prevent conflicts of interest, require disclosures, and close the loophole that allows federal judges to dodge accountability by stepping down from their posts.

**2\. End lobbying as we know it.**

Right now, the legal definition of lobbying is so limited that powerful interests can keep their influence-peddling in the shadows. We'll expand the definition to include anyone who is paid to influence lawmakers. And there'll be no more lobbying for foreign entities -- period.

All lobbyists will be under strict new rules, including not being able to donate or raise money for political candidates -- so no more legalized bribery. And every meeting between any lobbyist and any Congressional office or public official will be publicly reported. We'll also put a tax on excessive lobbying and use the revenue to give Congress and agencies tools to fight back against the corporate influence machine.

**3\. End the corporate capture of our federal agencies.**

Because of the revolving door, the avalanche of lobbyists, and the weakness of our government's tools to fight back, agencies often find their agendas hijacked by the very industries they are supposed to regulate.

We'll stop powerful interests from peddling fake research -- often funded by undisclosed donors -- and hold corporations accountable for lying to regulators. Corporate bigwigs won't get invited to negotiate rules their companies would have to follow, and they won't be able to use stall tactics to kill public interest rules.

**4\. Ensure Equal Justice Under Law -- not one set of rules for the wealthy and well-connected, and another for everyone else.**

We need to reform our legal rules to make sure every person who has been harmed can have their day in court.

Right now, many companies force their employees and consumers to sign away their rights to sue them in federal court if something goes wrong. How? By burying "forced arbitration" clauses and class action waivers in the fine print of contracts. Our plan will ban those practices.

**5\. Hold bad actors accountable -- with real penalties for breaking the rules and broad new government transparency standards.**

A new U.S. Office of Public Integrity and a strengthened Independent Office of Congressional Ethics will watch our government like hawks and enforce ethics rules.

We'll also tighten the rules to clarify that candidates can't get political assistance from foreign countries or solicit large hush money payments without facing legal consequences. Let's be clear: Donald Trump Jr. can't get dirt on political opponents from a foreign power, and Donald Trump can't get his lawyer to pay $130,000 to cover up an affair right before an election.

And we'll deter corruption by increasing transparency and strengthening open records laws.

There's more in the plan, but it all comes down to this: **Let's finally end the stranglehold that the wealthy and the well-connected have over our government**.

**[Add your name if you agree: We need big, structural change to root out corruption in Washington.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529e72/45c30650/136d205ac/668b102a/1743311317/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUo1MlBfUkxUX0NPUl9FXzIwMTkwOTE2X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-anti-corruption?source=EMJ52P_RLT_COR_E_20190916_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529e72/45c30650/136d205ac/668b102a/1743311317/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUo1MlBfUkxUX0NPUl9FXzIwMTkwOTE2X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-anti-corruption?source=EMJ52P_RLT_COR_E_20190916_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---

**Elizabeth doesn't accept contributions from PACs of any kind or federally registered lobbyists. This grassroots movement is powered by supporters like you. Chip in now to help build our movement.**

clean_body: Let's finally end the stranglehold that the wealthy and the well-connected have over our government. | | | "" No matter what issue brings you into this fight -- whether it's child care, student loans, health care, immigration, or criminal justice -- one thing is crystal clear: Corruption is making it worse. Our government works great for the wealthy and well-connected -- just not for everybody else. Giant corporations and billionaires who don't want to pay taxes or follow any rules use their money and influence to stand in the way of the big, structural change we need. It's corruption, plain and simple. We've got to call it out, and we've got to fight back. So today, I'm proposing the most sweeping set of anti-corruption reforms since Watergate. Our plan includes improving public integrity rules for federal officials in every branch of government, ending lobbying as we know it, fixing the criminal laws to hold corrupt politicians to account, and ensuring our federal agencies and courts are free from corrupting influences. And I'm just getting started. "" Here are some of the main pieces of our plan: 1\. Rewrite our ethics laws so that public servants actually serve the public -- not their own financial interests or the financial interests of the rich and powerful. Let's face it: Donald Trump is a walking conflict of interest. His refusal to divest from his businesses has opened the door for giant corporations, foreign lobbyists, and our own government officials to curry favor with his administration and pad his own bottom line. But Washington corruption didn't start with Donald Trump. The problem is much bigger than him, and restoring public confidence isn't just about replacing Trump and his cronies. We need big, structural change, new bright lines, and new clear rules to eliminate the possibility of public officials serving private interests. One way our plan fights back is by requiring presidents and vice-presidents to put their businesses into a blind trust to be sold off. And we'll automatically release the tax returns of all federal candidates and officeholders. We'll also ban government officials from trading individual stocks, so they can't use their power to increase the value of those stocks and pad their own pockets. And we'll put strict rules on so-called "political intelligence" firms that sell access to insider political information to help Wall Street traders make a quick buck. Next, it's time to close and padlock the revolving door between industry and government. We'll ban "golden parachutes" (pre-bribes that big companies give to executives who are on their way to serving in government), restrict lobbyists from entering government jobs, put a lifetime ban on presidents, vice presidents, members of Congress, and top appointees from becoming lobbyists, and ban companies from immediately hiring former senior government officials from agencies or offices they've been lobbying. This isn't only a problem for Congress and the White House -- our plan also holds the federal judiciary to the highest ethical standards. We'll put tough new rules in place to prevent conflicts of interest, require disclosures, and close the loophole that allows federal judges to dodge accountability by stepping down from their posts. 2\. End lobbying as we know it. Right now, the legal definition of lobbying is so limited that powerful interests can keep their influence-peddling in the shadows. We'll expand the definition to include anyone who is paid to influence lawmakers. And there'll be no more lobbying for foreign entities -- period. All lobbyists will be under strict new rules, including not being able to donate or raise money for political candidates -- so no more legalized bribery. And every meeting between any lobbyist and any Congressional office or public official will be publicly reported. We'll also put a tax on excessive lobbying and use the revenue to give Congress and agencies tools to fight back against the corporate influence machine. 3\. End the corporate capture of our federal agencies. Because of the revolving door, the avalanche of lobbyists, and the weakness of our government's tools to fight back, agencies often find their agendas hijacked by the very industries they are supposed to regulate. We'll stop powerful interests from peddling fake research -- often funded by undisclosed donors -- and hold corporations accountable for lying to regulators. Corporate bigwigs won't get invited to negotiate rules their companies would have to follow, and they won't be able to use stall tactics to kill public interest rules. 4\. Ensure Equal Justice Under Law -- not one set of rules for the wealthy and well-connected, and another for everyone else. We need to reform our legal rules to make sure every person who has been harmed can have their day in court. Right now, many companies force their employees and consumers to sign away their rights to sue them in federal court if something goes wrong. How? By burying "forced arbitration" clauses and class action waivers in the fine print of contracts. Our plan will ban those practices. 5\. Hold bad actors accountable -- with real penalties for breaking the rules and broad new government transparency standards. A new U.S. Office of Public Integrity and a strengthened Independent Office of Congressional Ethics will watch our government like hawks and enforce ethics rules. We'll also tighten the rules to clarify that candidates can't get political assistance from foreign countries or solicit large hush money payments without facing legal consequences. Let's be clear: Donald Trump Jr. can't get dirt on political opponents from a foreign power, and Donald Trump can't get his lawyer to pay $130,000 to cover up an affair right before an election. And we'll deter corruption by increasing transparency and strengthening open records laws. There's more in the plan, but it all comes down to this: Let's finally end the stranglehold that the wealthy and the well-connected have over our government. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | "" Elizabeth doesn't accept contributions from PACs of any kind or federally registered lobbyists. This grassroots movement is powered by supporters like you. Chip in now to help build our movement. | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02116

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Latest Times Hit on Brett Kavanaugh is a Clear Miss
body:
Here’s how blatantly, stunningly dishonest the piece is, the editors say: “Its biggest ‘shocker’ is... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b3ddc780e0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Latest Times Hit on Brett Kavanaugh is a Clear Miss**

“New York Times reporters Robin Pogrebin and Kate Kelly spent months reaching out to Yale alumni for more dirt on Justice Brett Kavanaugh’s undergraduate years more than three decades ago, and came up empty,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes.

“That’s the actual bottom line of their Times article that dropped online Saturday, though they suggest otherwise — since they clearly want to not just boost sales of the book, but also do whatever they can to further smear the justice.”

Here’s how blatantly, stunningly dishonest the piece is, the editors say: “Its biggest ‘shocker’ is noting the existence of yet another alleged Kavanaugh incident — but the article leaves out the fact that the supposed victim doesn’t remember a thing.” Under pressure, _The New York Times_ added an editor’s note to the piece yesterday, saying that “the book reports that the female student declined to be interviewed and friends say that she does not recall the incident. That information has been added to the article.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b0e3aa508a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The USMCA brings America’s economic relationship with Canada and Mexico into the 21st century. This new agreement strengthens NAFTA’s market-opening provisions for key industries, such as agriculture and manufacturing, and establishes a modern roadmap for digital trade across our continent,” Fred Lampropoulos, CEO of Utah-based Merit Medical Systems, writes in [_The Salt Lake Tribune_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=77ff44447a&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “When Americans think of food stamp recipients, images of desperate lower-income Americans typically come to mind . . . Imagine the outrage, then, as taxpayers find out that some of the people on food stamps are in fact millionaires,” Tim Andrews writes in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=31415dbe9b&e=3ee4985eea)_. Thanks to President Trump, “taxpayers may soon get a respite from this ludicrous loophole.”
---
|
---
| “The socialist-driven economic and humanitarian crisis ravaging the beautiful country of Venezuela should give every American pause. It is not just that this ideology, which has failed the people of this South American nation, is now establishing a footing here in the United States—but it’s also because our beacon of hope that shines throughout Latin America is being threatened by America’s adversaries,” Kimberly Guilfoyle writes in [_Townhall_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ffe3747f89&e=3ee4985eea). “We stand with the people of Venezuela in their struggle to restore democracy, freedom, and the rule of law,” Ivanka Trump said last week, as she met with Venezuelan refugees in Colombia.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fb644fe0cd&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9ade6d74e6&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=e8337d0770)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Jared DeLoof
subject: Find a Global Climate Strike near you

body:
| | | This Friday, join millions of people around the world for the Global Climate Strikes.
---
| [RSVP](https://click.everyaction.com/k/10000084/99827153/-1395087398?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDcyZmY5Mi1jM2Q4LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hv8-S7TmnC1rspeyOG0KLoX8uWeUSglxYyPlyFqbzCM=&emci=1a12495d-c2d8-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=5d72ff92-c3d8-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
**On September 20, young activists will take to the streets and send a powerful message to the world: Failure to act on climate change is a death sentence for our generation. **
Our future is at stake — and we refuse to be silent.
That’s why we’re excited to partner with the Global Climate Strike to speak out for climate justice and help register young voters at strikes in our communities.
[Sign up to join millions of people around the world participating in the #ClimateStrike on September 20.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/10000085/99827154/-1395087398?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDcyZmY5Mi1jM2Q4LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hv8-S7TmnC1rspeyOG0KLoX8uWeUSglxYyPlyFqbzCM=&emci=1a12495d-c2d8-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=5d72ff92-c3d8-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=6787172)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/10000086/99827155/-1395087398?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDcyZmY5Mi1jM2Q4LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hv8-S7TmnC1rspeyOG0KLoX8uWeUSglxYyPlyFqbzCM=&emci=1093d2b3-9f8b-e911-abc4-281878391efb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/10000087/99827156/-1395087398?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDcyZmY5Mi1jM2Q4LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hv8-S7TmnC1rspeyOG0KLoX8uWeUSglxYyPlyFqbzCM=&emci=1093d2b3-9f8b-e911-abc4-281878391efb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=6787172)
Together we can fight back against politicians who refuse to put our interests above polluters’ profits — but first we all need to be registered to vote so we can kick them out of office.
This Friday could be a historic day in the movement for climate justice, but we need people like you to help make it a success.
[Follow the lead of millions of students walking out of class to call attention to the urgency of this moment. clean_body: | | | This Friday, join millions of people around the world for the Global Climate Strikes. | | | Friend, On September 20, young activists will take to the streets and send a powerful message to the world: Failure to act on climate change is a death sentence for our generation. Our future is at stake — and we refuse to be silent. That’s why we’re excited to partner with the Global Climate Strike to speak out for climate justice and help register young voters at strikes in our communities. Together we can fight back against politicians who refuse to put our interests above polluters’ profits — but first we all need to be registered to vote so we can kick them out of office. This Friday could be a historic day in the movement for climate justice, but we need people like you to help make it a success. Thank you, Jared DeLoof National States Director NextGen America | NextGen America PO Box 538, San Francisco CA 94104 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump wants the death penalty. We say no!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Trump and his band of cronies at the Justice Department announced that they will restart the federal death penalty program and proceed with plans to execute those on death row, lifting a nearly two decades-long moratorium dating back to the Bush administration. Capital punishment is widely viewed as an archaic and violent tool of criminal justice, with its use being biased against people of color and other minority communities. Additionally, numerous examples of innocent people being convicted and placed on death row because of bad DNA evidence, overzealous prosecutors, and biased juries show that executions are a deeply flawed and problematic part of our judicial system. [**Join us in standing against this step backward for justice in our country; Add your name to the growing list of Americans who think that the federal government, and especially the Trump administration, should not be killing people. Help us urge the Justice Department to reverse their position by signing this petition.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd69/6e9863e8/14db35cc/1db0c3b8/4086302663/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/capital-punishment/wdtop/") Thank you for standing up for justice! -The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd69/6e9863e8/14db35cc/1db0c3b8/4086302663/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/capital-punishment/wdtop/")

When I see how far this campaign has come since we first launched, I'm blown away.

Every single breakthrough that we've accomplished is because of grassroots supporters like you who believe in Tim's message.

[**You 've powered us this far -- can you help out one more time to get Tim to the Ohio debate stage?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-october?recurring=1&amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Yoursquove+powered+us+this+far+mdash+can&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190916_1_5&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190916_1_5&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190916_1_5")

name: Mike Franken
subject: Your support adds up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Planning ahead can make all the difference. For our campaign and for you. A monthly gift is an effortless way to invest in our campaign.
|
---

| | Friends -- Planning is essential for campaign success. That's not just true for naval officers, it's true for candidates as well. I insist on planning for the long term. Since I know you want someone who will put Iowans first in the U.S. Senate next year, here's a quick way you can assist to make that happen. [**Make a recurring monthly contribution of $10 today -- just a few clicks right now will help you invest automatically in replacing Joni Ernst and her special interests.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2458/33365068/4a667f18/3f8ba88c/396422523/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-recurring-sept?refcode=20190916_em&recurring=1&amount=10") | [Donate $10 Monthly](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2458/33365068/4a667f18/3f8ba88c/396422523/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-recurring-sept?refcode=20190916_em&recurring=1&amount=10")
---

Making a monthly donation is easy, cost-effective, and a helpful predictor for planning future campaign activity. It gives me a steady source of resources, and it provides our campaign with the predictability to make smart campaign investments in staffing, media, and logistics. In short, the idea is to plan efficiently now to achieve a better result later.
[**Your $10 monthly investment today will help mightily to winning back this Senate seat tomorrow.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2458/33365068/4a667f18/3f8ba88c/396422523/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-recurring-sept?refcode=20190916_em&recurring=1&amount=10")
This campaign is growing, and this is your chance to help me every month without any hassle. And you can know your support has made an even greater impact without any extra effort.
**[Will you help us hit our goal of 100 monthly donors in September?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2458/33365068/4a667f18/3f8ba88d/396422523/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-recurring-sept?refcode=20190916_em&recurring=1")**

subject: re: We cannot miss this goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| I'm sorry to be emailing you again, but we're so close to reaching our $250,000 goal. My team just told me we're only $36,713 away! **Will you chip in right now to make sure we hit it by midnight tonight?** Here's a link to donate: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190916_CB_20190916-fr-CB-debatebump-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks for stepping up, we can't do it without you. Cory _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ After last week's debate, my team set a goal to raise $250,000 by midnight on September 15th. **Team, I'm writing to let you know that we 're extending our deadline to midnight tonight.** **[Will you chip in right now to make sure we hit our $250,000 goal?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190916_CB_20190916-fr-CB-debatebump-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I know this is no easy task -- but the FEC filing deadline is two weeks away, and we can't fall behind. Our campaign has seen real momentum these last few weeks, and we need to show the people that this underdog campaign can keep it up. **[So please, team, help us reach our $250,000 goal by 11:59 p.m. tonight.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190916_CB_20190916-fr-CB-debatebump-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks for helping us reach this critical goal,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190916_CB_20190916-fr-CB-debatebump-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.

This campaign is moving quickly. It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bec/5fca0d19/74e06451/291e7b3b/2043642787/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

body:
The pressure is turning up and we're working harder than ever to make sure we win this race for Kentucky.
|
---

| | | **50 DAYS OUT**

Help us reach our **one-day $5,000** goal

**[DONATE](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a8e/ad6dc73/1424989d/db46e91/36254681/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-fullsteam?refcode=20190916nd__258__&amount=5")**

Peter,

We're only 50 days out from Election Day. **The pressure is turning up and we 're working harder than ever to make sure we win this race for Kentucky. So as Andy's finance team, we're reaching out to ask: Can you help us reach our urgent $5,000 one-day goal?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a8e/ad6dc73/1424989d/db46e96/36254681/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-fullsteam?express_lane=true&refcode=20190916nd__258__&amount=5")**

**[DONATE $50](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a8e/ad6dc73/1424989d/db46e95/36254681/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-fullsteam?express_lane=true&refcode=20190916nd__258__&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a8e/ad6dc73/1424989d/db46eaa/36254681/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-fullsteam?express_lane=true&refcode=20190916nd__258__&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a8e/ad6dc73/1424989d/db46eab/36254681/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-fullsteam?refcode=20190916nd__258__")**
Andy and Jacqueline are working day and night, meeting people all across Kentucky and sharing their plans to improve their lives and restore transparency and decency to Frankfort. While Andy and Jacqueline are leaving it all on the field, we're just a little bit behind on donations. And with only 50 days to go, _we can 't afford to slow down even a little bit._

**We need to raise $5,000 by midnight. If everyone reading this message gives just $1, we 'll exceed our goal! [Can we count on you to chip in to help us get there?](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a8e/ad6dc73/1424989d/db46e91/36254681/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1OCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-fullsteam?refcode=20190916nd__258__&amount=5")**

The energy, enthusiasm, and polls are on our side. But we've got to keep pushing with everything we've got if we're going to turn our momentum into a win on November 5th.

Thank you for your support,

Beshear for Kentucky Finance Team

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Moscow Mitch closes the FEC in time for the 2020 election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The number of remaining Federal Election Commission (FEC) commissioners dropped to 3 at the end of August, bringing the nation's election regulatory body below the stipulated quorum of 4. They now cannot hold meetings, issue fines, or clarify rules that keep our elections as fair as possible, opening the door for campaigns to ignore finance regulations and accept endless amounts of money without fear of repercussions. Foreign governments will have an easier time interfering in the 2020 presidential elections, and GOP dark money will flow freely. This is no accident \-- it's part of a carefully orchestrated assault on democracy by national Republicans, specifically #MoscowMitch McConnell. He's the one who has stood in the way of campaign finance reform, spearheaded the _Citizens United_ case, and blocked any new appointments to the FEC. He is actively tearing down every protection that props up our democracy and even standing in the way of election protections that would stop Russia from meddling in 2020. If you believe that our country needs a fully functioning FEC and Democrats need to fight back against corrupt politicians like Mitch McConnell, we need your donation NOW. [**If every person reading this email gave just $1, we could give the GOP a run for their corporate PAC money in 2020. Can you help us save the FEC and repair the damage Trump, Mitch McConnell, and all the Republicans have done to our democracy by donating $1 today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd6d/6e9863e8/14d5601a/1db0c204/2592903/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190916b.ND&refcode2=OLB6pHHRE3QvKoEr0fzi") Thank you for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd6d/6e9863e8/14d5601a/1db0c209/2592903/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190916b.ND&refcode2=OLB6pHHRE3QvKoEr0fzi")

name: Warren HQ
subject: "But how would we pay for that?"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Elizabeth's plan would pay for all of this -- and so much more. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529f83/45c30650/136b3e72e/668b0bdd/1722739086/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
**[In just a few weeks, our FEC report will become public-- and we want it to show the biggest grassroots movement possible. Chip in any amount today, and we'll send you a free sticker as a thank you. ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529f83/45c30650/136b3e72e/668b0bdf/1722739086/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWQzLXN0aWNrZXIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSjUwRl9TVEtfVU1UX1FfMjAxOTA5MTZfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-d3-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ50F_STK_UMT_Q_20190916_V1S1_P")**
Elizabeth has released countless plans that would truly change people's lives and level the playing field for working families.

But with so many ideas that call for big, structural change, the first question is often, "how will we pay for that?"

The answer? The Ultra-Millionaire Tax: Elizabeth's plan to have the top one-tenth of 1% of Americans pitch in their fair share: Just two cents for every dollar between $50 million and $1 billion.

There's a lot you can do with two cents

_How can we cancel student debt for 95% of people who have it?_

The Ultra-Millionaire Tax.

_How would we pay for universal child care and pre-K for every child in this country from birth to school age?_

The Ultra-Millionaire Tax.

_How could we invest at least $50 billion in a new fund for Historically Black Colleges and Universities and other Minority Serving Institutions?_

The Ultra-Millionaire Tax.

_And what about that idea to provide universal free two-year and four-year public college and technical school?_

**The Ultra-Millionaire Tax. It would pay for all of this -- and so much more.**

It's amazing what you can do with two cents.

But the next question is, how do we put Elizabeth's plan into action? We build a grassroots movement across the country fighting to make it happen.

**[Will you chip in $3 right now to grow our grassroots movement and help hit our goal before our critical end-of-quarter deadline? We'll send you a free sticker to say thanks.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529f83/45c30650/136b3e72e/668b0bdf/1722739086/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWQzLXN0aWNrZXIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSjUwRl9TVEtfVU1UX1FfMjAxOTA5MTZfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-d3-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ50F_STK_UMT_Q_20190916_V1S1_P")**

clean_body: Elizabeth's plan would pay for all of this -- and so much more. | | | "" "" Elizabeth has released countless plans that would truly change people's lives and level the playing field for working families. But with so many ideas that call for big, structural change, the first question is often, "how will we pay for that?" The answer? The Ultra-Millionaire Tax: Elizabeth's plan to have the top one-tenth of 1% of Americans pitch in their fair share: Just two cents for every dollar between $50 million and $1 billion. There's a lot you can do with two cents How can we cancel student debt for 95% of people who have it? The Ultra-Millionaire Tax. How would we pay for universal child care and pre-K for every child in this country from birth to school age? The Ultra-Millionaire Tax. How could we invest at least $50 billion in a new fund for Historically Black Colleges and Universities and other Minority Serving Institutions? The Ultra-Millionaire Tax. And what about that idea to provide universal free two-year and four-year public college and technical school? The Ultra-Millionaire Tax. It would pay for all of this -- and so much more. It's amazing what you can do with two cents. But the next question is, how do we put Elizabeth's plan into action? We build a grassroots movement across the country fighting to make it happen. "" "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Thanks for being a part of this movement, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02116

name: Amy Mesner, SaraGideon.com
subject: [BUMP] Brett Kavanaugh
body:
Content warning: This email contains language related to sexual violence.

_Content warning: This email contains language related to sexual violence._
Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw Sara's note yesterday.
It's obvious that the "investigation" into Brett Kavanaugh's past was a sham - but Susan Collins still says she doesn't regret her vote to confirm him.
She should, and if you can contribute to Sara Gideon's campaign today, we can make sure she will. Chip in here:
**[Act.SaraGideon.com/Kavanaugh](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c22/4bef7a87/68b1c8ba/287f0e8b/3155470539/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MTYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-september?refcode=em190916-full")**
Thanks for your fight,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
_\------Original message------_
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c22/4bef7a87/68b1c8ba/287f0e8a/3155470539/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MTYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-launch?refcode=em190916-full")

Friends,
The _New York Times_ just reported that there was another individual with a story about Brett Kavanaugh's sexual misconduct in college.
They also report that lawyers for one of the women who came forward about Kavanaugh during his confirmation hearing provided the FBI a list of 25 possible witnesses to his misconduct, but the FBI chose not to interview a single person.
**It 's more clear than ever that the investigation into Brett Kavanaugh's past was a complete sham. **
The Republican-controlled Senate imposed strict rules on the FBI, preventing them from expeditiously moving forward with its investigation. But no matter what was uncovered, Republicans were going to vote to confirm him. It wouldn't have mattered.
Despite knowing that the FBI's investigation into his past was wildly incomplete, Susan Collins recently said she didn't regret her vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh.
She even said she was "sad" that her support for him has cost her support in Maine.
Well Senator Collins, we're sad too.
We're sad that our representative in the U.S. Senate gave this man a lifetime appointment to the Supreme Court without a thorough investigation into his past.
Thank you for reading.
Yours,
_Sara Gideon_
**Susan Collins said she does not regret her vote to confirm Brett Kavanaugh. She should, and if you can contribute to Sara Gideon 's campaign today, we can make sure she will.**
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c22/4bef7a87/68b1c8ba/287f0e8b/3155470539/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MTYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-september?refcode=em190916-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c22/4bef7a87/68b1c8ba/287f0e89/3155470539/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c22/4bef7a87/68b1c8ba/287f0e88/3155470539/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

Now that it has, we need to fight hard to remove Kavanaugh from the bench -- **because for too long, powerful men have believed that their actions shouldn 't have any consequences.**

name: DEMOCRATIC WIN (via Team Ben Ray)
subject: before Trump takes the stage:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | As you read this, Trump is on his way to New Mexico for a massive rally.

He's going to smear our Democrats. Attack Ben Ray. And pledge to steal this state from us. **But Ben Ray 's about to make Trump's disgusting rally completely BACKFIRE.** If just 87 more Democrats match their $5, we'll help Ben Ray send Trump a RESOUNDING message: You will never -- _NEVER_ \-- take this state from us. | ANTI-TRUMP MATCH: [ACTIVE](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190916_em_fr_b2_dwv_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

[ _**Suggested Support to Ben Ray 's Defense: $5 >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190916_em_fr_b2_dwv_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")
---
Not only is this a defining moment for Ben Ray.

It's a defining moment for Democrats' entire shot to win the Senate.

**If we let Trump swoop in to New Mexico, flip this state, and steal our historic opportunity to win the Senate -- we will always regret not doing more.**

Before Trump takes the stage, can Ben Ray count on your $5?
**Your generous gift will be emergency-matched -- but only until midnight.**
| ****[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190916_em_fr_b2_dwv_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")****
---

****[**Chip in $25 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190916_em_fr_b2_dwv_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,50,100,250")****
---

****[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190916_em_fr_b2_dwv_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=5,25,100,250")****
---

****[**Chip in $100 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190916_em_fr_b2_dwv_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=5,25,50,250")****
---

****[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190916_em_fr_b2_dwv_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")****
---
Let's make this rally completely BACKFIRE.

-Team Ben Ray
|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ac/18e32a7f/52da5b4e/7bffd7b9/348731931/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ac/18e32a7f/52da5b4e/7bffd7be/348731931/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ac/18e32a7f/52da5b4e/7bffd7bf/348731931/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ac/18e32a7f/52da5b4e/7bffd7bc/348731931/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ac/18e32a7f/52da5b4e/7bffd7bd/348731931/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ac/18e32a7f/52da5b4e/7bffd7b2/348731931/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Team Beto
subject: This isn’t good
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

We’ve got
some news for you.

First, the good news: Beto had a breakout performance at the debate, and
now our fundraising is going up.⬆

Now, the bad news: The Washington Post reports that three of our opponents
are holding at least 43 high-dollar donor fundraising events before the
FEC deadline, where they’ll collect lots of $2,800 checks.

Truthfully, while more people are getting involved in Beto’s campaign, our
average contribution is actually declining. It’s just $22 this past week.⬇
For each $2,800 check to our opponents, we need to match it with 127
online donations.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/34213?refcode=ema20190916-55582&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=55582%2E444211%2ESMK5tw ]Can you help Beto reach our FEC deadline goals by donating
$3? Raising enough money online is the only way we can
compete.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/34213?refcode=ema20190916-55582&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=55582%2E444211%2ESMK5tw ]Contribute $3 now

It’s tough for a grassroots campaign like ours to compete with candidates
who are raking in the big donor money. But if enough of us chip in online,
we can go toe-to-toe with even the most well-funded candidates in this
race.

Thanks for everything you do,

Team Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190916footer&t=1021&refcode2=55582_444211_SMK5tw&akid=55582%2E444211%2ESMK5tw

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=55582%2E444211%2ESMK5tw

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

subject: A cover-up, not an investigation

body:

| | Brett Kavanaugh does not belong on the Supreme Court. He lied to the Senate and to the American people. The Trump administration conspired to conceal over 200,000 documents about Kavanaugh's tenure in the Bush White House. And, of course, the credible allegations of sexual assaults by Kavanaugh are horrifying. It was clear last year, and reinforced by the news that broke yesterday about another previously unreported assault, that Kavanaugh has got to go to restore at least some of the Supreme Court's lost integrity. But that's not enough. **Yesterday, we learned that the FBI received credible information about yet another sexual assault by Brett Kavanaugh, but declined to review it in advance of his confirmation hearing by the Senate.** It was a cover-up, not an investigation. Donald Trump and the Senate Republicans didn't want to know and didn't care that their nominee had assaulted women, and then lied under oath about it. We have to defeat Donald Trump and take back the Senate to ensure that this president is no longer able to inflict unqualified, morally bankrupt judges on America. [**Here's how you can do that: Help us build a grassroots blue wave all across this country by donating $$3 right now.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d11c/6cd27893/51d10290/1587122a/3781995804/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blue-wave-project?refcode=2019-09-16-kavano&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") We must act. _Jeff_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d11c/6cd27893/51d10290/1587122b/3781995804/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blue-wave-project?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-09-16-kavano&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d11c/6cd27893/51d10290/15871228/3781995804/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blue-wave-project?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-09-16-kavano&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d11c/6cd27893/51d10290/15871229/3781995804/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blue-wave-project?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-09-16-kavano&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d11c/6cd27893/51d10290/15871226/3781995804/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blue-wave-project?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-09-16-kavano&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: Allen Ryan
subject: my son is the right man for the job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
My son has always been a hard worker. Growing up, he never shied away from a challenge. When things got tough he'd buckle down and **get the job done**. Tim's the same now as he was then -- only now he's running for president.

I'm so proud of the man my son has become, and I think the entire country needs to see his determination and grit for themselves. Tim has helped me look at all sides of things.

[**The next debate is right here in Ohio, and nobody deserves to be on that stage more than our Tim. Help him get there by donating just $3 or any amount now.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.%3D/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-october?recurring=1&amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+The+next+debate+is+right+here+in+Ohio+an&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190916_2_6&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190916_2_6&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190916_2_6")

There's a lot going on in the country right now, but Tim hasn't let any of that cloud his vision. When I see him on the trail he's focused on the real issues facing working families -- education, jobs, healthcare -- not about winning points from cable TV talking heads.

That's what we need in the Oval Office. **Nobody else in this race is as dedicated to getting the job done.**

Tim is the right man for the job, and he deserves to make his case on stage in his home state. If you agree with me, use this link to help him get there. [**https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/fighting-for-you**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-october?recurring=true&amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomfightingf&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190916_2_6&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190916_2_6&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190916_2_6")

|

Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States!
