body:
you're an important part of this grassroots movement and we hope you'll tune in | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529f9d/45c30650/136bd8cc5/668b362b/4050199455/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Earlier this morning, Elizabeth introduced her plan to root out Washington corruption -- the most sweeping set of anti-corruption reforms since Watergate.

And tonight, she'll be giving a speech about it in New York City, near the historic site of the Triangle Shirtwaist Factory fire -- a symbol of the danger of corruption and the power of people fighting back to make big, structural change.

**You're an important part of this grassroots movement and we hope you'll tune in.**

[**Click here to tune in live at 7pm ET tonight:**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529f9d/45c30650/136bd8cc5/668b362a/4050199455/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUo1M09fTFZTX0NPUl9DXzIwMTkwOTE2X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com/live?source=EMJ53O_LVS_COR_C_20190916_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

| [ **WATCH**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529f9d/45c30650/136bd8cc5/668b362a/4050199455/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUo1M09fTFZTX0NPUl9DXzIwMTkwOTE2X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com/live?source=EMJ53O_LVS_COR_C_20190916_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---

Washington works great if you're wealthy and well-connected. It works great if you're a lobbyist, or if you're a fossil fuel executive, or a billionaire.

It doesn't work for working families.

We need to rewrite the rules to make our government work for all Americans, not just whoever has the fattest wallet. And that begins with ending corruption.

And by the former Triangle Shirtwaist Factory, where working women got organized, persisted, and changed the course of history, Elizabeth will be talking about her plans to root out corruption and make sure that we all have an equal piece of our democracy.

Click on the link below to watch the speech live at 7pm ET tonight:

[**https://elizabethwarren.com/live**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529f9d/45c30650/136bd8cc5/668b362d/4050199455/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUo1M09fTFZTX0NPUl9DXzIwMTkwOTE2X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.elizabethwarren.com/live?source=EMJ53O_LVS_COR_C_20190916_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Thanks,

Team Warren

[ **DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529f9d/45c30650/136bd8cc5/668b362c/4050199455/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUo1M09fTFZTX0NPUl9DXzIwMTkwOTE2X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ53O_LVS_COR_C_20190916_V1S1_P")

clean_body: you're an important part of this grassroots movement and we hope you'll tune in | | | "" Earlier this morning, Elizabeth introduced her plan to root out Washington corruption -- the most sweeping set of anti-corruption reforms since Watergate. And tonight, she'll be giving a speech about it in New York City, near the historic site of the Triangle Shirtwaist Factory fire -- a symbol of the danger of corruption and the power of people fighting back to make big, structural change. You're an important part of this grassroots movement and we hope you'll tune in. "" | "" Washington works great if you're wealthy and well-connected. It works great if you're a lobbyist, or if you're a fossil fuel executive, or a billionaire. It doesn't work for working families. We need to rewrite the rules to make our government work for all Americans, not just whoever has the fattest wallet. And that begins with ending corruption. And by the former Triangle Shirtwaist Factory, where working women got organized, persisted, and changed the course of history, Elizabeth will be talking about her plans to root out corruption and make sure that we all have an equal piece of our democracy. Click on the link below to watch the speech live at 7pm ET tonight: "" Thanks, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02116

#
Last week, the U.S. Senate made history. **150 judges have been confirmed since President Trump took office!**

President Trump has kept his promise to nominate judges who defend the Constitution and keep judicial activism off the bench, but we can’t stop now. **More nominees are pending, but radical Democrats are still doing whatever it takes to obstruct and delay their confirmation.** Enough is enough.

[**We need to keep President Trump’s agenda moving, and that includes confirming his judicial nominees. Do you agree? SIGN our petition right now!**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=be0e424572&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| [CONFIRM PRESIDENT TRUMP'S NOMINEES ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=6799b6eb85&e=02cd889ad3 "CONFIRM PRESIDENT TRUMP'S NOMINEES ")
---
| Since this President took office, we’ve confirmed 105 district court judges, 43 circuit judges, and **two Supreme Court justices.** This is huge for the future of our country!

Because of our results, radical Democrats are more fired up than ever before, and they’re telling us exactly what they will do if they get the chance.**In fact, they’ve even talked about expanding and packing the Supreme Court with radical liberal justices.**

We must not let that come to pass. We must keep up the momentum for President Trump’s winning agenda, and that includes confirming more judges who will defend the Constitution.

As one of my top supporters, your input on this issue is critical. [**Please, sign our petition today, and let’s send Senate Democrats a message together.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=73aa7323b3&e=02cd889ad3)
[ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=de25256653&e=02cd889ad3)
Thank you for everything.

David

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: We're meeting voter suppression head on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
We have a fight on our hands, friend. And we need you with us right now. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa507/34a064cc/18e79a99/70316c4/3592779351/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - You may have seen the news that Crooked Media (producers of _Pod Save America_) is partnering with Fair Fight to help us raise the necessary funds to build voter protection teams in 20 battleground states across the country so every single vote is counted in 2020. They know that protecting the right to vote is the single most important thing we can do right now. And we're grateful to have them in this fight with us. We're tackling voter suppression head on _right now_ , and we know the fight for voting rights and freedom from systemic voter suppression must happen on multiple fronts: **advocacy, legislation, and litigation.** That's why, last November, we filed a landmark federal voting rights lawsuit, arguing that Georgia's elections system violates the Constitution of the United States of America and must be reformed. [**We have a fight on our hands. We need you with us, friend. Can we count on you to make your first contribution to Fair Fight today?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa507/34a064cc/18e79a99/70316c5/3592779351/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE091619CASEND") In just six short months, our lawyers will be in trial - meaning that we'll be able to pursue justice for Georgia voters on the aggressive timeline that they deserve. Make no mistake: what happens in our case could set a national precedent that other states must follow. That's because local and state officials all across the country, emboldened by the Supreme Court effectively gutting the Voting Rights Act in _Shelby County v. Holder_ , are shamelessly weakening voter registration, ballot access, and ballot-counting procedures. In Georgia and across our country, voters deserve the right to pick their leaders and set the direction of our nation. And we cannot rest until this democracy is fully realized. Help us get there,
Team Fair Fight **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa507/34a064cc/18e79a99/70316c5/3592779351/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE091619CASEND")**
---

name: Liz Robertson
subject: 50 days isn't a lot of time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Team, 50 days isn't a lot of time, but that's all that's left between today and the election on November 5th.
|
---

| | Peter,

**50 days isn 't a lot of time, but that's all that's left between today and the election on November 5th.**

That's _**50 days**_ to spread Andy and Jacqueline's vision for a better Kentucky.

_**50 days**_ to fend off Matt Bevin's malicious, misleading attack ads.

_**50 days**_ to show Kentuckians that they'll soon have the choice to elect a better governor, one who will put our Commonwealth first above all else.

But **none** of that will be possible if we can't raise the necessary funds to get the word out and push back against Bevin's ads. | [](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a8d/ad6dc73/142586c2/db46c94/3813752434/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI2MiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-fullsteam?refcode=20190916.2nd__262__&amount=5")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Watch baseball legend Mariano Rivera receive the Medal of Freedom ⚾
body:
Today, President Donald J. Trump presented the Presidential Medal of Freedom—America’s highest civilian honor—to one of the best closers in... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2e50cb41e9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 16, 2019
---
| | |
# **Baseball legend Mariano Rivera awarded Medal of Freedom ****⚾**

**Today,** **President Donald J. Trump** presented the Presidential Medal of Freedom—America’s highest civilian honor—to one of the best closers in American sports history, former New York Yankees pitcher Mariano Rivera.

**🎬** **President Trump:**[He shines as an example of American greatness!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9661318e78&e=3ee4985eea)

**During 19 seasons** in Major League Baseball, Rivera established himself as the greatest relief pitcher of all time. His legendary career began with the Yankees in 1990, with whom he became a 13-time All-Star and a 5-time World Series champion.

**After hanging up the glove** , Rivera became the first player in the history of the sport to be elected unanimously into the National Baseball Hall of Fame.

**Off the field,** Rivera is an incredible humanitarian and patriot. His Mariano Rivera Foundation, for example, has provided hundreds of scholarships and countless educational resources to underprivileged children.

[Watch Rivera’s story of learning English: “I was the happiest man in baseball.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4d06accfd9&e=3ee4985eea)

**In photos** : [See past recipients of the Medal of Freedom.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2b57948a41&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **America’s economic miracle goes west**

**President Trump left for** **New Mexico** this afternoon, the first stop of a three-day trip for the President out West. The timing couldn’t be better, as families across “the Land of Enchantment” feel the economic revival happening under this Administration.

**New Mexico’s economy** is flourishing, and it’s not difficult to see how—and when—it started happening. Since President Trump’s election, New Mexico’s unemployment rate has dropped from 6.5 percent to 4.9 percent. Nearly 35,000 jobs have been added in that span, many going to workers in the state’s blue-collar industries.

**The state’s economic future** looks bright, as well, with applications to start new businesses—the lifeblood of innovation and wage growth—up 29 percent in that time.

**What explains the success?** One reason is the rebirth of American industry under President Trump. One crucial sector to New Mexico’s economy, for example, is energy. In addition to general pro-growth policies such as tax cuts, the Trump Administration has prioritized removing burdens that used to weigh down American energy producers.

**Today, crude oil production** in New Mexico has skyrocketed more than 110 percent, hitting a record high last year. The state’s natural gas production has seen phenomenal growth, too, increasing by 40 percent since President Trump’s election.

**These industries** provide real value for middle-class families across America—and good-paying jobs for workers in places like New Mexico and elsewhere.

**And as a border state,** of course, no one knows firsthand more about the importance of real border security than New Mexico families and law enforcement officers. Otero County declared a state of emergency earlier this year while President Trump pressured Congress to help him address the security and humanitarian crisis at the border.

**President Trump****’s efforts** are paying off, especially after successful negotiations led Mexico, Guatemala, and other countries to step up and do more to help American officials end the surge of illegal immigration and crime spilling across our border.

[The border wall is going up fast!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1692f9508c&e=3ee4985eea)

**Morning in America** : [Disadvantaged groups see biggest gains in Trump Economy!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=48ce148d98&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
| **President Donald J. Trump presents the Presidential Medal of Freedom to Baseball Legend Mariano Rivera in the East Room of the White House** | September 16, 2019
---

Trump presented the Presidential Medal of Freedom—America’s highest civilian honor—to one of the best closers in... | | | | | The White House • September 16, 2019 | | | Baseball legend Mariano Rivera awarded Medal of Freedom ⚾ Today, President Donald J. Trump presented the Presidential Medal of Freedom—America’s highest civilian honor—to one of the best closers in American sports history, former New York Yankees pitcher Mariano Rivera. 🎬 President Trump: During 19 seasons in Major League Baseball, Rivera established himself as the greatest relief pitcher of all time. His legendary career began with the Yankees in 1990, with whom he became a 13-time All-Star and a 5-time World Series champion. After hanging up the glove , Rivera became the first player in the history of the sport to be elected unanimously into the National Baseball Hall of Fame. Off the field, Rivera is an incredible humanitarian and patriot. His Mariano Rivera Foundation, for example, has provided hundreds of scholarships and countless educational resources to underprivileged children. In photos : | | America’s economic miracle goes west President Trump left for New Mexico this afternoon, the first stop of a three-day trip for the President out West. The timing couldn’t be better, as families across “the Land of Enchantment” feel the economic revival happening under this Administration. New Mexico’s economy is flourishing, and it’s not difficult to see how—and when—it started happening. Since President Trump’s election, New Mexico’s unemployment rate has dropped from 6.5 percent to 4.9 percent. Nearly 35,000 jobs have been added in that span, many going to workers in the state’s blue-collar industries. The state’s economic future looks bright, as well, with applications to start new businesses—the lifeblood of innovation and wage growth—up 29 percent in that time. What explains the success? One reason is the rebirth of American industry under President Trump. One crucial sector to New Mexico’s economy, for example, is energy. In addition to general pro-growth policies such as tax cuts, the Trump Administration has prioritized removing burdens that used to weigh down American energy producers. Today, crude oil production in New Mexico has skyrocketed more than 110 percent, hitting a record high last year. The state’s natural gas production has seen phenomenal growth, too, increasing by 40 percent since President Trump’s election. These industries provide real value for middle-class families across America—and good-paying jobs for workers in places like New Mexico and elsewhere. And as a border state, of course, no one knows firsthand more about the importance of real border security than New Mexico families and law enforcement officers. Otero County declared a state of emergency earlier this year while President Trump pressured Congress to help him address the security and humanitarian crisis at the border. President Trump’s efforts are paying off, especially after successful negotiations led Mexico, Guatemala, and other countries to step up and do more to help American officials end the surge of illegal immigration and crime spilling across our border. Morning in America : | | Photo of the Day | Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian | President Donald J. Trump presents the Presidential Medal of Freedom to Baseball Legend Mariano Rivera in the East Room of the White House | September 16, 2019 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Tina Smith
subject: My promise to you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
September is my first end-of-quarter deadline since Jason Lewis announced he was running against me. We need to make sure that we hit our mid-month benchmark to stay ahead. Can I count on you to help?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190916midmonth2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team,

I'm not slowing down on this.

Fighting for Minnesotans in the Senate gives me the fire to win this race.

Because Mitch McConnell continues to block common-sense reforms that the public overwhelmingly supports, like securing our election system or addressing gun violence. His leadership is a threat to our democracy, and I will not stop fighting for what's right. I am ready to see action.

When Democrats flip the Senate in 2020, I know that we're going to accomplish great things. And I am determined to be a part of making those accomplishments happen.

**We're halfway through September -- our first big financial deadline since I got an opponent. I'm not slowing down on building our campaign for success. Can I count on you to do your part?**

**[Please chip in $10 now to meet our mid-month goals so I can make change in the Senate.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190916midmonth2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4150f/c1f7015/679e121c/11467bc2/3219973805/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLXNlcHQyMDE5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTE5MDkxNm1pZG1vbnRoMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190916midmonth2-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

While there is so much potential to make great strides for our country, we know that the Republicans are doing anything they can to hold us back. What Mitch McConnell doesn't realize is that we have strength in our numbers and will make our voices heard from now until next November.

**I promise that every single day, I will not slow down on making progress for Minnesotans. Will you help me keep moving forward?**

**[Make sure we can keep Minnesota blue. Pitch in $10 now so I can continue to fight for Minnesotans.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190916midmonth2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Tina

name: Ed Markey
subject: I'm calling for the immediate impeachment of Brett Kavanaugh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello,

The latest bombshell reporting from the New York Times of new sexual assault allegations against Brett Kavanaugh confirms what we already knew:

Kavanaugh was confirmed after a sham investigation and a GOP-whitewashing of the serious and credible allegations against him.

Justice cannot be served while Kavanaugh sits on our highest court. He must be impeached.

_**[Sign our petition and demand Congress take action to impeach Brett Kavanaugh.](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dcce/693b8b0a/44fbe207/72de929a/3821018992/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/impeach-kavanaugh?source=091619_3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_

The FBI's investigation into sexual assault allegations involving Kavanaugh was a White House cover-up working in coordination with Senate Republicans.

The latest reporting now confirms that Trump's Justice Department didn't even investigate these now corroborated accounts of sexual assault.

We cannot in good conscience allow Kavanaugh to remain on the Supreme Court.

_**[Sign our petition and demand Congress take action to impeach Brett Kavanaugh.](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dcce/693b8b0a/44fbe207/72de929a/3821018992/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/impeach-kavanaugh?source=091619_3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**_

Thanks,

Ed
